items.title: Set up elevated access for Gustav
items.detail: Create dedicated admin account or configure passwordless sudo for specific trusted commands (tailscaled, gateway restarts etc.) so Gustav can run elevated commands without Aaron's personal password being sent over Telegram.

items.title: Weekly Sonnet diagnostic + monthly Opus strategic review
items.detail: Weekly cron (Sonnet): routine system health check — crons, memory, scripts, configs. Monthly cron (Opus): strategic audit — is the architecture right, what's being wasted, what should change. Post results to #diagnostics.
